label: 857–6 to 857–12 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 95–63, § 7(a)91 Stat. 267July 5, 1977
notes: Section 857–6, , , , established National Advisory Committee on Oceans and Atmosphere. See .Pub. L. 92–125, § 185 Stat. 344section 857–13 of this titleAug. 16, 1971
Section 857–7, , , , provided for membership, terms of office, duties, and Chairman and Vice Chairman of Committee. See .Pub. L. 92–125, § 285 Stat. 344section 857–14 of this titleAug. 16, 1971

Section 857–8, , , , provided for designation of a senior policy official of Federal departments and agencies to assist Committee. See .Pub. L. 92–125, § 385 Stat. 344section 857–17(a) of this titleAug. 16, 1971
Section 857–9, , , ; , , , provided for an annual report by Committee. See .Pub. L. 92–125, § 485 Stat. 344Pub. L. 94–69, § 289 Stat. 384section 857–15 of this titleAug. 16, 1971Aug. 5, 1975
Section 857–10, , , , provided for compensation and travel expenses of Committee members. See .Pub. L. 92–125, § 585 Stat. 344section 857–16 of this titleAug. 16, 1971
Section 857–11, , , , provided for assistance to Committee by Federal departments and agencies. See .Pub. L. 92–125, § 685 Stat. 345section 857–17 of this titleAug. 16, 1971

Section 857–12, , , ; , , ; , , , authorized appropriations for operation of the Committee. See .Pub. L. 92–125, § 785 Stat. 345Pub. L. 92–56786 Stat. 1181Pub. L. 94–69, § 189 Stat. 384section 857–18 of this titleAug. 16, 1971Oct. 25, 1972Aug. 5, 1975
